Class ParallelSimulationProvider

java.lang.Object
org.episteme.core.technical.algorithm.simulation.ParallelSimulationProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
AlgorithmProvider, SimulationProvider
@AutoService({SimulationProvider.class,AlgorithmProvider.class}) public class ParallelSimulationProvider extends Object implements SimulationProvider
Parallel implementation of the SimulationProvider.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

    • parallelExecute

      public void parallelExecute(List<Runnable> tasks, int threadCount)
      Description copied from interface: SimulationProvider
      Executes a set of simulation tasks in parallel.
      Specified by:
      parallelExecute in interface SimulationProvider
      Parameters:
      tasks - the tasks to execute
      threadCount - the degree of parallelism
